pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-21 from 8.72.8 to 8.75.2
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-21](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.72.8 to 8.75.2.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-21's releases.

8.75.2

What's Changed

  • Use Groovy 4 parser by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6228
  • Fix ChangeDependency isAcceptable returning true for all files by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6889

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.75.1...v8.75.2

8.75.1

What's Changed

  • Update Gradle wrapper DSL configuration in build scripts by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite#6876
  • Fix bugs and performance issues in rewrite-python by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6851
  • Preserve existing Gradle wrapper distribution type by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite#6874
  • C# Support by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6678
  • Minor amendment to Python tests - delete venv, uv.lock symlinks after tests by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6872
  • JavaScript: Don't remove double negations by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6878
  • Convert ChangeDependency to ScanningRecipe to preserve GString/StringTemplate versions by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6858
  • Honor empty in MavenPomDownloader by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6875
  • Fix RPC framework errors caused by concurrent visitor cursor access by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6880
  • C#: Add MSAL license header to files under rewrite-csharp by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6883
  • Fix StackOverflowError in DefaultJavaTypeSignatureBuilder for cyclic types by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6884
  • Add module-specific CLAUDE.md files for Python and JavaScript by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6886
  • C#: nugetApiKey check on publishing by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6887
  • Fix IllegalArgumentException in KotlinParser when dependsOn paths are relative by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6882

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.75.0...v8.75.1

8.75.0

What's Changed

  • Python: Fix RPC write_message to use binary mode on Windows by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6850
  • Support empty JSP documents, or documents only containing comments by @​evie-lau in openrewrite/rewrite#6846
  • Python: Update ty-types dependency to released 0.0.19 by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6853
  • Fix IllegalArgumentException in Input.getRelativePath for relative paths by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6843
  • Python: Add f-string support for Python template/pattern API by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6854
  • Use version patterns in ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId tests by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6856
  • Support escaping property placeholders with backslash by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6817
  • Python: Add context, dependencies, and configure() to Python Template/Pattern by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6855
  • Clean up .context/ directory by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6859
  • Fix print idempotency for annotated array type casts by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6861
  • Handle unresolved Maven credential placeholders gracefully by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6845
  • Fix Maven parser on ${project.version} in parent reference by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6860
  • JavaScript: Fix Yaml.Mapping non-empty prefix error for nested flow mappings by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6864
  • JavaScript: Fix three found JS/TS parse failures by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6863
  • Ensure ImportLayoutStyles can be merged by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6862
  • JavaScript: Fix stack overflow in Type.signature for cyclic parameterized types by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6867
  • JavaScript: Fix empty named imports parse failure and add validator to parseProject() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6866
  • Fix GradleWrapperTest after Gradle 9.4.0 got released by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6871
  • fix: KotlinVisitor.visitAnnotatedExpression now traverses inner expression by @​thake in openrewrite/rewrite#6870
  • Skip recipe validation for imperative recipes in assertRecipesConfigure() by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6841

... (truncated)

Commits
  • 66b51ea Fix ChangeDependency isAcceptable returning true for all files (#6889)
  • 3e403bf Use Groovy 4 parser (#6228)
  • 2301028 Fix IllegalArgumentException in KotlinParser when dependsOn paths are relativ...
  • 8b7a44f nugetApiKey check (#6887)
  • b8c05d2 Add module-specific CLAUDE.md files for Python and JavaScript (#6886)
  • 4d9aa37 Fix StackOverflowError in DefaultJavaTypeSignatureBuilder for cyclic types (#...
  • d182d38 Add MSAL license to rewrite-csharp (#6883)
  • 68d913c Fix RPC framework errors caused by concurrent visitor cursor access (#6880)
  • cb33ce3 Honor empty <relativePath/> in MavenPomDownloader (#6875)
  • e7b0d17 Convert ChangeDependency to ScanningRecipe to preserve GString/StringTemplate...
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
